title: Stdout Writer
description: Reads input tables and prints them to stdout. For debugging only — no Iceberg output is produced.

format.description: Format to print input tables in.
format.x-datuplet-doc: Requested directly from the Data Gateway, so no client-side conversion happens. Any value other than "csv"/"json" (or an unparseable config) is not a validation error at the component level — it silently falls back to a raw passthrough of whatever bytes the gateway returns, requested in CSV form.
